docket_entries.description: ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL. REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JUN-16-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAFFEE, THOMAS
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *SEE SIGNATURE ON GREEN CARD* SERVED SEP-29-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAFFEE, THOMAS

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CHAFFEE, THOMAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-22-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-14-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO ADD THE METROPOLITAN. PLAINTIFF YVETTE NAROG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THOMAS CHAFFEE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF YVETTE NAROG APPEARED. DEFENDANTS THOMAS CHAFFEE AND THE METROPOLITAN HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY STEPHANIE SCHWARZ MILLER, GENERAL MANAGER. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAROG, YVETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAFFEE, THOMAS THE METROPOLITAN HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANTS WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF, NOR DID THE EVIDENCE SUPPORT THAT DEFENDANTS UNREASONABLY WITHHELD ACCESS TO ASSOCIATION RECORDS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE METROPOLITAN HOWEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ON 11/14/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
